projectDescription: A Chrome extension with cloud sync that captures your AI conversations, extracts knowledge, and surfaces relevant context across all your devices.
keyFeatures: Automatic conversation capture from ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI platforms
On-device PII sanitization before any data leaves the browser
Semantic search powered by local embeddings (no API costs)
Cross-device cloud sync with passwordless email OTP authentication
Projects to organize conversations and attach notes, URLs, and snippets
Timeline — daily AI-generated summaries of your conversation activity
Context packs — curated memory bundles assembled per project
Prompt improvement and context injection directly in chat interfaces
Profile compartmentalization for strict data isolation between contexts
publicApiSurface: GET /conversations — list conversations with platform/cursor filtering
GET /conversations/:id — get single conversation with metadata
GET /projects — list all projects with sources and conversations
GET /projects/:id/context-pack/export — export context pack as Markdown
POST /projects/:id/sources — add note/URL/snippet source to project
GET /timeline/:date — get timeline for a specific date
GET /search — search across projects and conversations
POST /sync/incremental — sync conversations and messages from extension
